title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer, argues that current AI systems already understand us and may be conscious, and that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concern that society is not adequately addressing AI risks including job displacement, alignment challenges at major labs, and the need for regulation.
